product_description: An AI-native outbound sales platform that researches companies, scores ICP fit, identifies pain points, and drafts evidence-grounded personalized outreach automatically for sales and revenue teams.
value_propositions: Cuts SDR research and drafting time from ~20 minutes to under a minute per account.
Grounds every claim in live web evidence instead of generic templates.
Adds a self-reviewing quality gate before any email goes out.
ideal_tech_signals: Recent GTM or sales-team hiring activity
disqualifiers: Pure consumer (B2C) company with no B2B sales motion
No dedicated sales or GTM team
